privileged_info_summary: The task creates a Net Promoter Score (NPS) survey in LimeSurvey 6 using the martialblog/limesurvey:6-apache Docker image. The NPS classification ranges (Detractor: 0-6, Passive: 7-8, Promoter: 9-10) are verified as correct per standard NPS methodology. LimeSurvey 6 supports all required features: Equation questions (type '*') for classification logic, multiple question types (Numeric 'N', List Radio 'L', List Dropdown '!', Long Free Text 'T'), relevance equations for conditional logic, and anonymous survey settings. The metadata specifications for question codes (NPS, NPSCat, DetractorQ, PassiveQ, PromoterQ) and title keywords (NPS, Net Promoter, Customer Experience) are consistent with the task requirements and standard survey design practices.
